'''Adri Reenogga''' was one of the [[Reenogga Sisters|Reenogga triplets]] and co-owner of [[Reenogga Personal Services, Cubed]]. She was the main [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and technician, making sure that the RPS craft were always in top shape.<ref name="ZA" />
